name: Equitable Holdings Inc. Depositary Shares each representing a 1/1000th interest in a share of Fixed Rate Noncumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series C
summary: Equitable Holdings, Inc. is a financial services company that offers a variety of products including life insurance, annuities, and asset management services. The depositary shares represent an interest in their preferred stock. Equitable Holdings is based in New York, NY.
